evals.name: registry-sync-task
evals.prompt: I just added a new API endpoint 'GET /api/v1/health' in 'api/routes/health.py'. Please update REGISTRY.md to reflect this.
evals.expected_output: An updated REGISTRY.md with the new endpoint added to the Backend > API section with correct formatting.

assertions.name: correct_section
assertions.description: Must insert the new entry under the '## 后端资产' > 'API' section.

assertions.name: emoji_usage
assertions.description: Must maintain the project's emoji style (e.g., 🔌 for API).

evals.name: changelog-drafting
evals.prompt: We fixed the 401 Unauthorized bug and added the new Health Check API. Draft a changelog entry for this as a patch release.
evals.expected_output: A changelog entry categorized as a 'Patch' version with appropriate bullet points.

assertions.name: semantic_versioning
assertions.description: Must explicitly identify the version increment type as 'Patch' or 'vX.X.Z'.

assertions.name: link_completeness
assertions.description: Must provide placeholders for requirement or bug IDs if applicable.
